title: morelosia recurva
intro: Morelosia recurva, also known as the recurved Morelosia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to tropical forests in Central and South America, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and the reduction of fever. Morelosia recurva can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
